summary: Made surgical seam edits by reframing the opening around breakfast rather than a corridor walk and by adding a brief closing handoff into the castle's increasingly visible damage before chapter 16.
edits: Rewrote the opening entry point to begin in the Great Hall, preserving the same shift-in-perception beat while avoiding the neighboring corridor-damage scaffold.
Kept Barnabas's failing charm as the first sign of Gavin's cognitive shift, but moved it into a short retrospective beat after the new opening anchor.
Added a brief closing paragraph to bridge from Gavin's choice in the sub-collection to the school's accumulating visible damage.
